name: Knack Online Database API
what_it_does: No-code online database and application builder with REST API — enabling non-technical users to create custom database-backed web applications with forms, tables, charts, user portals, and payment processing, without writing code, with a drag-and-drop interface and API access for integration.
use_cases: Reading and writing database records via Knack REST API for external integration
Building custom web portals with user authentication and role-based access via Knack
Integrating Knack database apps with external systems via REST API and Zapier
Querying Knack records for custom reporting and analytics dashboards
Managing Knack application data programmatically for bulk imports and exports
not_for: Enterprise BPM and complex process automation (use Appian or Pega)
Mobile-native apps (use Glide or Adalo for mobile-first no-code)
High-traffic customer-facing web apps (use Webflow or custom code)
best_when: A small to mid-size business needs a custom database-backed web application with user portals, forms, and reports — without a developer — especially for internal operations, membership portals, or project tracking.
avoid_when: You need mobile apps, complex workflows, high-traffic public apps, or advanced UI design beyond what a structured database view provides.

auth.notes: API key from Knack builder settings. X-Knack-Application-Id and X-Knack-REST-API-Key headers required for every request. App-scoped access. Knack User Token for user-authenticated requests. Webhook for record create/update/delete events. No OAuth2. Zapier integration available for no-code automation.

pricing.notes: San Diego-based company. Founded 2010. Bootstrapped and profitable. Pioneer in no-code database applications. 4,000+ customers. Competing directly with Caspio and Quickbase in the SMB segment. Knack builder (drag-and-drop UI) generates the app — API manages data. Strong for non-profits, associations, and operations teams.

performance.rate_limits: 150 requests per 10-second window per API key

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for objects, records, files, and users. Dual-header auth (Application-Id + REST-API-Key). Good documentation. App-scoped access model. Knack User Token for user-context operations. Webhook for data events. Record filters use Knack query syntax — needs platform knowledge.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Record reads fully idempotent. Record creation not idempotent — check by unique field before creating. File uploads not idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Dual-header auth: both X-Knack-Application-Id and X-Knack-REST-API-Key required
Knack User Token required for user-authenticated operations — separate from REST API key
Record filters use Knack's own query syntax — different from standard query params
Rate limit: 150 requests/10 seconds — implement backoff for bulk operations
HIPAA BAA available but requires Corporate or Enterprise plan

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, HIPAA, GDPR compliant. US data residency. Dual-header API key auth. HIPAA BAA available. User portal data may include PII — implement data minimization. API key in headers — use environment variables and rotate regularly.
